hero_badge: Software Company · Ho Chi Minh City
hero_sub: Nexora Technology is a custom software partner — from web and mobile to IoT and legacy migration. We build products that are solid, scalable, and beautiful.
services_title: Six core capabilities, one expert team.
services_sub: From your first MVP to enterprise-scale systems — Nexora is with you at every stage.
svc1_desc: Responsive, high-performance websites with modern UX, built-in SEO and security.
svc2_desc: Native and cross-platform mobile apps for iOS & Android, tuned for engagement and growth.
svc3_desc: Custom applications with robust functionality, optimized performance, aligned with your strategy.
svc4_desc: Continuous updates, bug fixes and performance tuning — keeping your software reliable and safe.
svc5_desc: Integrate smart devices, streamline operations, unlock insights from your data.
svc6_desc: Modernize outdated systems — migrate seamlessly to future-proof platforms.
process_sub: A tight, transparent, repeatable loop — adapted to each partnership model.
proc1_d: Understand the problem, users and business goals. Workshops, research, solution mapping.
proc2_d: System architecture, hi-fi UI/UX, interactive prototypes — validated before a line of code.
proc3_d: Two-week sprints, CI/CD, tight code review. You see progress every day.
proc4_d: Automated tests, penetration testing, performance audits before every release.
proc5_d: Zero-downtime deploys, 24/7 monitoring, instant rollback when needed.
proc6_d: Maintenance, improvements, new features. Products live on — not closed projects.
models_title: Pick the model that matches how you work.
models_sub: Three IT outsourcing models — each solves a different problem.
m1_desc: An expert team, managed and working exclusively on your project.
m2_desc: Clear, predictable cost for projects with a well-defined scope upfront.
m3_desc: Flexible billing based on actual hours and resources used.
m1_desc_v: You hire a full-time development team as if they were internal staff.
m1_flex_v: Very flexible — tasks can shift anytime
m1_pm_v: Client-led (Nexora can provide a PM on request)
m1_pros_v: Great for long-term · Dedicated, scalable team
m1_cons_v: Fixed monthly cost · Requires clear internal management
m2_desc_v: One fixed price for the whole project with a clearly defined scope.
m2_cons_v: Risk if scope is unclear · Less flexible
m3_desc_v: Billed on actual hours worked and resources used.
m3_flex_v: Very flexible — adapts to change easily
m3_cons_v: Budget can grow if not tracked
compare_sub: Click a column to highlight. Sort by any criterion on the left.
tech_sub: A mature stack, chosen to fit the problem — not the trend.
clients_sub: From startups to enterprises — Nexora is the tech partner behind.
testi1_q: Nexora delivered on time, with quality above expectations. We treat them as part of our internal team.
testi2_q: Transparent process, deeply skilled engineers. Our ERP migration finished three weeks ahead of schedule.
testi3_q: They don't just write code — they understand the business. That's the biggest difference.
about_title: A software studio born in 2025, in Saigon.
about_p1: Nexora Technology was founded on a simple belief: great software doesn't come from templates — it comes from deeply understanding the problem, picking the right tools, and disciplined execution.
about_p2: We're engineers, designers and product managers sharing one philosophy: do less, do it better. Every project we take is carefully selected — so we can pour in the care it deserves.
about_v1_d: Every line reviewed. Every release tested.
about_v2_d: You see everything we're doing, always.
about_v3_d: Products live long past launch. We're there with you.
contact_sub: We reply within 24 business hours. No spam, no telemarketing.
f_success_d: Request received. The Nexora team will reach out within 24 hours.
sub_cta_desc: Tell us about it. First consultation is free.
cs_lead: {count} case studies from fintech to IoT — each with concrete metrics.
cs_cta_desc: Tell us about it. First consultation is free.
blog_lead: Articles on engineering, design, culture, and how we build software at Nexora.
blog_cta_desc: One post per month — no spam, no ads.
career_lead: We're hiring people who want to make good software — not lots of software. Open roles below.
career_cta_title: Don't see a role that fits?
career_cta_desc: Send us a general application. If you impress us, we open the role.
